subject: Re:
body:
Dear Jeffrey :-) U didn't failed anyone!
It is all as it is ment to be. 
To have such a wonderful friend who cares so much....is more then anyone can ask for!
Let's stick to our conversations. :-)
Hope we can see when I'm back in NY. Would love to continue our talks :-)

Sending tons of love 
Lots of love, light and happiness,
Petra  

-----Original Message-----
From: "J. Epstein" <jeeproject@yahoo.com>

Date: Tue, 22 Jan 2008 23:31:35 
To:petranemcova@mac.com
Subject: Re:


As a friend ,It is me that has failed U. I have been unable to communicate  the fundamentals  and seriousness of business success to you. re real estate... start with "these are the things that are wrong.. and list evrything, bad noise, traffic, smell views, taxes, permits, etc. that is what will set you apart. Ignore the amateur tendencies to sell//   our conversations have been extremely helpful and I greatly respect your views. thanks

----- Original Message ----
From: "petranemcova@mac.com" <petranemcova@mac.com>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Tuesday, January 22, 2008 2:21:21 PM
Subject: Re:

Thank U so much. I think I understand dear Jeffrey.
I'm sorry If I have faild U.
Thank U for giving me chance and beliving in me.
It is always nice to see U as a friend! That means the world to me!  
I hope that U R happy and that U had amazing Birthday.
:-)
It looks like I'm in NY 6-14th. I probably will work few days, but let me know if U R arround then.
Thank U so so much.


------Original Message------
From: Jeffrey Epstein
To: Petra Nemcova
Sent: 21 Jan 2008 09:12
Subject: 

Petra,  
        I would appreciate the opportunity to explain more fully ,when you and I are once again in the same city, For now, I will not need any help in prague.- thank you for your birthday wishes/


Lots of love, light and happiness,
Petra
